name: io.github.Timwal78/mcp-x402
description: The x402 Amazon: 43+ MCP tools, pay-per-call. SEC, squeeze, options, FTD, XRPL/Base payments.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode. Use 'sse' for HTTP server mode.

environmentVariables.name: SML_PAYMENT_RECEIVER
environmentVariables.description: USDC Base address to receive payments from agent tool calls.

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_SEED
environmentVariables.description: BIP-39 mnemonic for the server wallet. Auto-generated if not set.
